internalSources.summary: DATA domain overview: 14 topic files (10 DATA-owned + 4 transition-zone LOGIC), ObjectType definitions, property types (19 base + 5 extended), value types, structs, geospatial, timeseries, attachments, vectors, cipher, shared-properties. Canonical constraints: max 2000 properties, KNN max K=100/dims=2048.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Includes 2026-Q1 features (AIP Document Intelligence GA Feb 2026, Core Object Views GA Feb 2026, Derived Properties Beta) — fully current.

internalSources.summary: LOGIC domain overview: Impact Propagation Graph thesis — Link Types (propagation paths), Interfaces (shape contracts), Queries (graph traversal), Derived Properties (cascade formulas), Functions (computation units). 4 topic files: functions.md, object-sets.md, testing.md + README. Explicit propagation only (no automatic cascading).
internalSources.currencyRationale: Referenced in schemas v0.2.1 primitives layer; LOGIC domain rules directly encoded in palantir-mini v0.2 lib/codegen and lib/actions.

internalSources.summary: ACTION domain overview: Two-tier architecture (Tier-1 declarative simple rules, Tier-2 function-backed — mutually exclusive). 5 topic files: mutations.md, webhooks.md, automation.md, data-flow.md, listeners.md. 9 submission criteria constraint classes. Progressive autonomy 3-tier. Action logs as queryable ontology objects.
internalSources.currencyRationale: OSv1 deprecation June 2026 flagged; OSv2 action constraints authoritative. Actions.md references OSDK 2.0 $validateOnly / $returnEdits patterns.

internalSources.summary: DevCon series DC1-DC5 architectural evolution. DC5 (March 11 2026): 3-stage product journey (Golden Tables → Operational Decision-Making → AI-First), 4 design principles (DDD/DRY/OCP/PECS), key primitives (Interfaces, Structs, Reducers, Derived Properties, Object-Backed Link Types), AI FDE eval-driven loop, Embedded Ontology, Scenarios.
internalSources.currencyRationale: DC5 is March 11 2026 — most recent DevCon event. Session state accurately records the 3-phase product journey that governs this rebuild.

internalSources.summary: Permanent architecture SSoT: D/L/A 3-domain + SECURITY overlay model, 4-stage semantic compilation pipeline (Business Language → Domain Modeling → Schema Compilation → Logic Binding → Action Execution), OOSD paradigm, Digital Twin SENSE→DECIDE→ACT→LEARN, 3 hallucination reduction patterns (OAG/Logic Tool Handoff/Human-in-Loop), 5-level progressive autonomy, Decision Lineage. 51 DH, 136 HC, 9 CI.
internalSources.currencyRationale: AIPCon 9 (March 12 2026) D/L/A framing validated on-stage by Palantir Architect Chad Wahlquist. Most recent primary architecture reference.

internalSources.summary: 6-phase validation timeline (design/compile/deploy/merge/runtime/post-write), cross-domain contract triangle (DATA-LOGIC: type safety, LOGIC-ACTION: verifyOntologyEditFunction, DATA-ACTION: StaleObject + PK immutability), per-domain validation summary, industry pattern mapping (Pact/DbC/SHACL), decision lineage completeness validation, K-LLM coherence verification.
internalSources.currencyRationale: OSv1 deprecation June 2026 noted. StaleObject behavior documented. 6-phase pipeline matches palantir-mini v0.2 lib/validation/pipeline.ts which implements 4 of 6 phases (deploy+merge deferred to v1).

internalSources.summary: AIPCon 9 Ship OS reusable patterns: Governed Multi-Path Decision Package (trigger→dependency-aware reasoning→courses-of-action→approval→atomic execution→writeback), Action Log as Queryable Ontology Object, Intelligent Communications Triage. Extraction boundary: cross-domain patterns only, no naval-specific nouns.
internalSources.currencyRationale: AIPCon 9 March 12 2026 material — most recent available. Extraction boundary documented prevents naval-domain contamination.

internalSources.summary: Workflow Lineage (product GA Nov 2025) vs Decision Lineage (conceptual 5D framework). Workflow Lineage = what executed through which surface. Decision Lineage = WHEN/ATOP_WHICH/THROUGH_WHICH/BY_WHOM/WITH_WHAT. Bound to palantir-mini via emit_event + replay_lineage. EventType discriminator list for workflow vs decision events.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Workflow Lineage GA Nov 2025, Cross-Ontology visualization Feb 2026, Expanded access Mar 2026 — current. Implementation binding to palantir-mini event-log is authoritative.

internalSources.summary: 5-dim Decision Lineage full spec: WHEN/ATOP_WHICH/THROUGH_WHICH/BY_WHOM/WITH_WHAT. Workflow Lineage graph model (Object Types, Object Links, Actions, Functions, AIP Logic Functions, Language Models, Workshop Applications, Automations, Interfaces, Text Nodes). Graph controls and color legends. AIP usage observability.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Cross-Ontology visualization Feb 2026 confirmed current. AIPCon 9 sourced.

internalSources.summary: Meta-layer philosophy: Ontology as decision-centric OS (not database), 5-level progressive autonomy, K-LLM multi-model consensus, 3 hallucination reduction patterns, Decision Lineage as LEARN mechanism. 4 files: digital-twin.md, llm-grounding.md, ontology-ultimate-vision.md, tribal-knowledge.md.
internalSources.currencyRationale: AIPCon 9 + Chief Architect blog quotes verified current through March 2026.

internalSources.summary: SECURITY domain overview: 4-layer security model (RBAC / Marking-Based / Object-Level Row+Column / Object+Property Security Policies cell-level). SECURITY as governance overlay cross-cutting D/L/A. 3 topic files: permissions.md, markings.md, object-security.md.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Object Security Policies (DC5-10) and Project-Based permission model (Jan 2026) referenced. Current as of March 2026.

internalSources.summary: Code-level gap analysis (2026-03-17): What is already real in code vs Palantir product surface. Decision Lineage/Workflow Lineage analogue (5D fields), LEARN loop analogue (evaluation rubrics, refinement signals, automation graduation), Schema self-audit BackPropagation. Code corrections: rubric score integrity, graduation boundary, structured outcome records.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Dated 2026-03-17. References frontend-dashboard/convex paths — these may be from a prior project iteration that doesn't match current 3-project scope (palantirkc home/palantir-math/mathcrew). Useful for gap patterns, not for current code paths.

internalSources.summary: 6-layer orchestration map: Builder Surfaces, Ontology Semantic Core, Runtime Digital Twin, Governance+Security, LEARN+Eval, Integration Expansion. Foundry product surfaces mapped to local equivalents. Keeps system pointed at Palantir-style end-state vs isolated feature drift.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Structural reference — not time-sensitive. Current authority chain matches UNIVERSALIZATION.md (2026-04-17).

internalSources.summary: OSDK research index: 4 files — osdk-2.0-architecture.md [Official] (client/generated separation), osdk-version-pinning.md [Official] (@osdk/client@0.1.0 pattern), osdk-1-to-2-migration.md [Official] (TypeScript migration guide), pm-codegen-vs-osdk.md [Synthesis] (our delta — filesystem, no HTTP client). Created 2026-04-17.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Created 2026-04-17 as part of universalization. Content extraction from external research briefing noted as pending; may have stub content in sub-files.

internalSources.summary: Marketplace research router: Foundry Marketplace distribution (namespace/prefix rules during install), Claude Code plugin marketplace parallel, palantir-mini single-plugin marketplace structure. References .claude-plugin/marketplace.json and claude-code/palantir-mini-blueprint.md.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Plugin distribution architecture stable reference — governs palantir-mini v1.0 redesign.

internalSources.summary: Schema ontology axis query router and structure index: 5 primitive types (ObjectType/LinkType/ActionType/InterfaceType/PropertyType), 3 function types (EditFunction/DerivedProperty/Reducer), 3 policy types (SubmissionCriteria/RBAC/ForwardProp+BackwardProp), 2 lineage types (DecisionLineage/EventTypes), 2 generator types (OSDK-2.0-config/LazyLoader). 10 EventType variants. Provenance: kosmos TechBlueprint @767fa10.
internalSources.currencyRationale: v0.2.1 schemas are the current artifact (2026-04-17). BROWSE.md includes palantir-mini v0 primitives layer added during universalization session.

internalSources.summary: Export contracts for backend, frontend, runtime, LEARN infrastructure. Key types: OntologyDomain (4 values), OntologyPropertyType (24 members = 19 base + 5 extended), BasePropertyType (19 lowercase), LinkCardinality (4: 1:1/M:1/1:M/M:N), MutationType (5), QueryType (7), AutonomyLevel (5), SecurityLayerType (4), PropertyReducerStrategy (6). Cross-axis imports from interaction/rendering.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Active contract — schema-lock rule prevents modification during Phase A. v0.2.1 is the authoritative current version.

internalSources.summary: Root package @palantirKC/claude-schemas v0.2.1. 4 axes: ontology@1.12.0/interaction@0.1.2/meta@0.1.0/rendering@0.1.0. Extended exports map (12 subpath exports). v0.2.1 (2026-04-17): extended exports map + root index.ts + README. v0.2.0: root package.json + CHANGELOG + manifest.json + axis entrypoints. Pre-universalization baseline at v0.1.x.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Current production version. All 3 consumer projects pinned to git+...claude-schemas.git#v0.2.1. CHANGELOG documents exact additions.

internalSources.summary: Zero-dependency stdio MCP server (JSON-RPC 2.0). 5 MCP tools: get_ontology (domain-filtered snapshot from events.jsonl), emit_event (mutex-locked atomic append, 0 lost / 2000 at 2-writer race), apply_edit_function (returns Edits[] without committing), commit_edits (atomic, pre-flight 9 submission criteria, validateOnly dry-run support), replay_lineage (5-dim Decision Lineage filter). Reports version 0.1.0 in serverInfo.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Active production MCP server. Package.json shows version 0.1.0 but CLAUDE.md references palantir-mini 0.2. v1.0 is rebuild target.

internalSources.summary: 6 hook events registered: PreToolUse (Edit/Write/MultiEdit → pre-edit-ontology.ts), PostToolUse (Edit/Write/MultiEdit → post-edit-propagate.ts), PreCompact (blocking → pre-compact-state.ts), TaskCompleted (task-completed-gate.ts), Stop (stop-validate.ts), SessionStart (session-start.ts). Missing: TaskCreated, TeammateIdle, SubagentStop, PostCompact, ShutdownRequest — large coverage gap vs 27 available hook events.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Current plugin hooks. 6 of 27 available hook events used — this is the primary gap indicator for v1.0 hook expansion.

internalSources.summary: 4-phase validation pipeline orchestrator: Design + Compile + Runtime + Post-Write. Comment explicitly notes Deploy + Merge phases deferred to v1 (of 6-phase full Palantir set). Phases run independently, no fail-fast (v0 behavior — change to fail-fast in v1). Aggregate verdict = all phases pass.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Current production validation implementation. Deploy + Merge gap explicitly documented in source comments — directly informs v1.0 design.

internalSources.summary: OSDK 2.0 client/generated split enforcement: SplitPolicy (clientRoot, generatedRoot, generatedMarker). checkSplit validates write targets. auditGeneratedRoot walks generatedRoot checking all files for marker. Generated marker constant: '// AUTO-GENERATED by palantir-mini'.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Active codegen enforcement. Directly maps to rules/11-codegen-authority.md contract.

internalSources.summary: Layer-1 RBAC fragment: Allow (Read schemas/ontology/**, Read research/palantir/**, Read/Write .palantir-mini/session/**, Write src/generated/**, Bash plugin scripts, bun test, bunx tsc, 5 MCP tools). Deny (Write schemas/ontology/types.ts and semantics.ts — schema lock). Env vars: PALANTIR_MINI_SESSION_DIR, PALANTIR_MINI_SNAPSHOT_DIR, PALANTIR_MINI_EVENTS_FILE.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Active RBAC enforcement. Schema lock (deny Write to types.ts/semantics.ts) is critical constraint for Phase A research.

internalSources.summary: pm-verify: 4-phase validation pipeline runner, schema-versioning rule enforcer, codegen drift checker. pm-codegen: descender-gen.ts runner, emits codegen_started/completed events, produces src/generated/*.ts. pm-blueprint: proxies to kosmos-research 7-agent pipeline, requires blueprint.json + final-report.md, evaluator gate R1-R15 acceptance. All 7 plugin skills confirmed (pm-action, pm-blueprint, pm-codegen, pm-init, pm-recap, pm-replay, pm-verify).
internalSources.currencyRationale: Active plugin skill surface. These are the v0.2 canonical skills that v1.0 must extend or replace.

internalSources.summary: ship: Ontology-aware finalization + commit + PR + merge. 465-line skill. Has semantic drift firewall, doc-sync protocol, pm-verify integration, but does NOT consume events.jsonl to generate PR body or enforce lineage gates — gap vs v1.0 target. orchestrate: 6-phase Lead protocol (CHECK/INJECT/AUDIT/DECIDE/DECOMPOSE/EXECUTE/VALIDATE). 406-line skill. Partially integrates palantir-mini (event emission on phase transitions, pm-verify on validate) but plugin is not the substrate.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Both skills are rebuild candidates per NEXT_SESSION_ONTOLOGY_REBUILD.md. ship does not consume events.jsonl. orchestrate treats plugin as afterthought, not substrate. These are the v0 baselines to rewrite.

internalSources.summary: 15 files in 5 subdirs. Primitives: ObjectTypeDeclaration (branded RID, properties, links, implements[]), LinkTypeDeclaration, ActionTypeDeclaration (Tier1/Tier2 discriminated union), InterfaceType, PropertyType (24 branded names). Functions: EditFunction (returns Edits[] without commit), DerivedProperty (onRead/cached), Reducer<In,Out> (PECS). Policies: SubmissionCriteria (9 constraint classes), RBACFragment (Layer-1 only), ForwardProp+BackwardProp. Lineage: DecisionLineage 5-dim, EVENT_TYPE_REGISTRY (10 variants). Generators: OSDK-2.0-config, LazyRef.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Derived from kosmos TechBlueprint @767fa10, produced by 7-agent pipeline. Active executables in palantir-mini v0.2 descender-gen.ts. v1.0 must extend, not replace.

internalSources.summary: Distribution channel architecture: claude-schemas as Maven-analog (semver-tagged git artifact via peerDeps), palantir-mini plugin as OSDK-analog (single installable cross-project surface), home repo as control plane, authority chain (research→schemas→ontology→contracts→runtime→audits). Consumer pin matrix (all 3 projects at v0.2.1). Plugin upgrade protocol (no peerDep bump needed). Open alignment work noted.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Updated 2026-04-17 in orchestrate session. Directly governs v1.0 migration strategy and authority chain for this rebuild.

internalSources.summary: palantir-math/ontology/: 14 files (BROWSE.md, INDEX.md, BEHAVIOR.md, action.ts, capabilities/capabilities.ts, changeContracts/changeContracts.ts, data.ts, data/ subdir, frontend.ts, logic.ts, runtime.ts, schema.ts, security.ts). mathcrew/ontology/: 16 files (BROWSE.md, INDEX.md, action.ts, beat-template.ts, concept-primitive.ts, data.ts, event-envelope.ts, frontend-adapter.ts, frontend-semantic-core.ts, frontend.ts, learn.ts, logic.ts, runtime.ts, schema.ts, security.ts, theater-kind.ts). Home repo: no ontology/ dir.
internalSources.currencyRationale: Current filesystem state verified 2026-04-17. mathcrew has richer ontology (theater-kind.ts, event-envelope.ts, frontend-semantic-core.ts) vs palantir-math (capabilities, changeContracts). Home repo lacks ontology/ — gap to fill in v1.0.

pluginIntrospection.versionNote: package.json shows 0.1.0 but CLAUDE.md and UNIVERSALIZATION.md reference palantir-mini v0.2.0. Version in package.json not updated during universalization — rebuild should confirm.
pluginIntrospection.hookEventsCoverage: 6 of 27 available Claude Code hook events (22% coverage)
gapsForFoundryParity: Missing: Deploy + Merge validation phases (only 4 of 6 implemented in pipeline.ts — explicitly noted in source)

Missing: 21 hook events not covered (TaskCreated, TeammateIdle, SubagentStop, PostCompact, ShutdownRequest, TeamCreated/Deleted, TeammateJoin/Leave/Error, AgentStart/Stop/Error/Message, PlanApproval, MemoryWrite/Read, ToolApproval/Denied, CompactStart, UserPromptSubmit)
Missing: OSDK regen trigger on schema change (codegen not invoked automatically on schema edit — only via pm-codegen skill or manual)
Missing: Shared schema registry (schemas live at ~/.claude/schemas not in plugin bundle — split ownership)
Missing: Capability token system (no CapabilityToken primitive — RBAC is Layer-1 role-only, no cell-level markings)
Missing: PermissionsCascade (explicitly deferred to v1 in managed-settings.d/50-palantir-mini.json)
Missing: Semantic intent dispatcher (/palantir-dispatch) — no AIP-analog skill router
Missing: /ontology-register skill — no primitive registration workflow
Missing: events.jsonl → PR body lineage in /ship (ship reads docs, not lineage events)
Missing: Plugin-side vs consumer-side schema lock enforcement (deny rules in managed-settings.d, but no pm-verify gate blocking schema edits at PreToolUse)
Missing: BrandedRID for LinkType, InterfaceType (ObjectType has branded RID; others only have string APINames)
Missing: Struct primitive type in primitives/ layer (Struct defined in types.ts but no primitives/struct.ts with registry)
Missing: ValueType primitive (value-types are in types.ts but no primitives/value-type.ts with codegen contract)
Missing: monitors/ integration with hooks (drift-watch.ts + event-log-tail.ts exist but not wired to hook events)

primitivesMissingVsPalantir4Pillar: Struct primitive (primitives/struct.ts with StructDeclaration + StructRegistry — currently only in types.ts as StructType interface)
ValueType primitive (primitives/value-type.ts with ValueTypeDeclaration + branded constructor — currently only in types.ts as ValueType interface)
SharedPropertyType (primitives/shared-property.ts — currently only in types.ts, not in codegen pipeline)
Object-Backed LinkType as distinct primitive (link-type.ts has discriminated union but Object-Backed flavor may need richer metadata)
CapabilityToken (no token-based governance primitive — RBAC is role-only)
MarkingDeclaration (no CBAC/classification primitive — Layer-2/3 security deferred)
AutomationDeclaration (automation.md researched but no automation primitives in primitives/)
WebhookDeclaration (webhooks.md researched but no webhook primitives in primitives/)
ScenarioSandbox (DC5-10 Scenarios for what-if planning — not implemented)
AIPLogicFunction (AIP Logic function type — not in primitives layer)

axisGapsVsRebuildTarget.ontology: 1.12.0 — Current axis version is high (112 minor bumps). v1.0 target = consolidate primitives layer into canonical export, deprecate types.ts/semantics.ts legacy sections superseded by primitives layer, add missing primitive types.
axisGapsVsRebuildTarget.interaction: 0.1.2 — Low version, low usage in rebuild target. Likely keep as-is unless palantir-math frontend needs v1.0 update.
axisGapsVsRebuildTarget.meta: 0.1.0 — Minimal. No per-project use found. May be deprecated or integrated into ontology axis.
axisGapsVsRebuildTarget.rendering: 0.1.0 — mathcrew has theater-kind.ts, beat-template.ts — rendering axis may need extension for theater primitives in v1.0.

rebuildVerdictPreview.orchestrate: REWRITE — plugin must be substrate, not afterthought; every phase transition via plugin MCP calls
rebuildVerdictPreview.lsp-audit: REVIEW — reexamine if TypeScript-only audits still make sense when ontology is authority
rebuildVerdictPreview.palantir-walk: REVIEW — role unclear without seeing content
rebuildVerdictPreview.tavily-cli: KEEP or DELETE — external search utility, not ontology-integrated
rebuildVerdictPreview.pm-* deprecated stubs: DELETE — superseded by plugin-scope versions per rule 05-skill-invocation-order.md
rebuildVerdictPreview.palantir-math per-project skills: REVIEW — keep those with project-specific semantic ownership
rebuildVerdictPreview.mathcrew/3d-scene-audit + verify: REVIEW — may be superseded by plugin pm-verify

sources.summary: Marketplace research router: Foundry Marketplace distribution (namespace/prefix rules during install), Claude Code plugin marketplace parallel, palantir-mini single-plugin marketplace structure. References .claude-plugin/marketplace.json and claude-code/palantir-mini-blueprint.md.
sources.currencyRationale: Plugin distribution architecture stable reference — governs palantir-mini v1.0 redesign.

sources.summary: Schema ontology axis query router and structure index: 5 primitive types (ObjectType/LinkType/ActionType/InterfaceType/PropertyType), 3 function types (EditFunction/DerivedProperty/Reducer), 3 policy types (SubmissionCriteria/RBAC/ForwardProp+BackwardProp), 2 lineage types (DecisionLineage/EventTypes), 2 generator types (OSDK-2.0-config/LazyLoader). 10 EventType variants. Provenance: kosmos TechBlueprint @767fa10.
sources.currencyRationale: v0.2.1 schemas are the current artifact (2026-04-17). BROWSE.md includes palantir-mini v0 primitives layer added during universalization session.

sources.summary: Export contracts for backend, frontend, runtime, LEARN infrastructure. Key types: OntologyDomain (4 values), OntologyPropertyType (24 members = 19 base + 5 extended), BasePropertyType (19 lowercase), LinkCardinality (4: 1:1/M:1/1:M/M:N), MutationType (5), QueryType (7), AutonomyLevel (5), SecurityLayerType (4), PropertyReducerStrategy (6). Cross-axis imports from interaction/rendering.
sources.currencyRationale: Active contract — schema-lock rule prevents modification during Phase A. v0.2.1 is the authoritative current version.

sources.summary: Root package @palantirKC/claude-schemas v0.2.1. 4 axes: ontology@1.12.0/interaction@0.1.2/meta@0.1.0/rendering@0.1.0. Extended exports map (12 subpath exports). v0.2.1 (2026-04-17): extended exports map + root index.ts + README. v0.2.0: root package.json + CHANGELOG + manifest.json + axis entrypoints. Pre-universalization baseline at v0.1.x.
sources.currencyRationale: Current production version. All 3 consumer projects pinned to git+...claude-schemas.git#v0.2.1. CHANGELOG documents exact additions.

sources.summary: Zero-dependency stdio MCP server (JSON-RPC 2.0). 5 MCP tools: get_ontology (domain-filtered snapshot from events.jsonl), emit_event (mutex-locked atomic append, 0 lost / 2000 at 2-writer race), apply_edit_function (returns Edits[] without committing), commit_edits (atomic, pre-flight 9 submission criteria, validateOnly dry-run support), replay_lineage (5-dim Decision Lineage filter). Reports version 0.1.0 in serverInfo.
sources.currencyRationale: Active production MCP server. Package.json shows version 0.1.0 but CLAUDE.md references palantir-mini 0.2. v1.0 is rebuild target.

sources.summary: 6 hook events registered: PreToolUse (Edit/Write/MultiEdit → pre-edit-ontology.ts), PostToolUse (Edit/Write/MultiEdit → post-edit-propagate.ts), PreCompact (blocking → pre-compact-state.ts), TaskCompleted (task-completed-gate.ts), Stop (stop-validate.ts), SessionStart (session-start.ts). Missing: TaskCreated, TeammateIdle, SubagentStop, PostCompact, ShutdownRequest — large coverage gap vs 27 available hook events.
sources.currencyRationale: Current plugin hooks. 6 of 27 available hook events used — this is the primary gap indicator for v1.0 hook expansion.

sources.summary: 4-phase validation pipeline orchestrator: Design + Compile + Runtime + Post-Write. Comment explicitly notes Deploy + Merge phases deferred to v1 (of 6-phase full Palantir set). Phases run independently, no fail-fast (v0 behavior — change to fail-fast in v1). Aggregate verdict = all phases pass.
sources.currencyRationale: Current production validation implementation. Deploy + Merge gap explicitly documented in source comments — directly informs v1.0 design.

sources.summary: OSDK 2.0 client/generated split enforcement: SplitPolicy (clientRoot, generatedRoot, generatedMarker). checkSplit validates write targets. auditGeneratedRoot walks generatedRoot checking all files for marker. Generated marker constant: '// AUTO-GENERATED by palantir-mini'.
sources.currencyRationale: Active codegen enforcement. Directly maps to rules/11-codegen-authority.md contract.

sources.summary: Layer-1 RBAC fragment: Allow (Read schemas/ontology/**, Read research/palantir/**, Read/Write .palantir-mini/session/**, Write src/generated/**, Bash plugin scripts, bun test, bunx tsc, 5 MCP tools). Deny (Write schemas/ontology/types.ts and semantics.ts — schema lock). Env vars: PALANTIR_MINI_SESSION_DIR, PALANTIR_MINI_SNAPSHOT_DIR, PALANTIR_MINI_EVENTS_FILE.
sources.currencyRationale: Active RBAC enforcement. Schema lock (deny Write to types.ts/semantics.ts) is critical constraint for Phase A research.

sources.summary: pm-verify: 4-phase validation pipeline runner, schema-versioning rule enforcer, codegen drift checker. pm-codegen: descender-gen.ts runner, emits codegen_started/completed events, produces src/generated/*.ts. pm-blueprint: proxies to kosmos-research 7-agent pipeline, requires blueprint.json + final-report.md, evaluator gate R1-R15 acceptance. All 7 plugin skills confirmed (pm-action, pm-blueprint, pm-codegen, pm-init, pm-recap, pm-replay, pm-verify).
sources.currencyRationale: Active plugin skill surface. These are the v0.2 canonical skills that v1.0 must extend or replace.

sources.summary: ship: Ontology-aware finalization + commit + PR + merge. 465-line skill. Has semantic drift firewall, doc-sync protocol, pm-verify integration, but does NOT consume events.jsonl to generate PR body or enforce lineage gates — gap vs v1.0 target. orchestrate: 6-phase Lead protocol (CHECK/INJECT/AUDIT/DECIDE/DECOMPOSE/EXECUTE/VALIDATE). 406-line skill. Partially integrates palantir-mini (event emission on phase transitions, pm-verify on validate) but plugin is not the substrate.
sources.currencyRationale: Both skills are rebuild candidates per NEXT_SESSION_ONTOLOGY_REBUILD.md. ship does not consume events.jsonl. orchestrate treats plugin as afterthought, not substrate. These are the v0 baselines to rewrite.

sources.summary: 15 files in 5 subdirs. Primitives: ObjectTypeDeclaration (branded RID, properties, links, implements[]), LinkTypeDeclaration, ActionTypeDeclaration (Tier1/Tier2 discriminated union), InterfaceType, PropertyType (24 branded names). Functions: EditFunction (returns Edits[] without commit), DerivedProperty (onRead/cached), Reducer<In,Out> (PECS). Policies: SubmissionCriteria (9 constraint classes), RBACFragment (Layer-1 only), ForwardProp+BackwardProp. Lineage: DecisionLineage 5-dim, EVENT_TYPE_REGISTRY (10 variants). Generators: OSDK-2.0-config, LazyRef.
sources.currencyRationale: Derived from kosmos TechBlueprint @767fa10, produced by 7-agent pipeline. Active executables in palantir-mini v0.2 descender-gen.ts. v1.0 must extend, not replace.

sources.summary: Distribution channel architecture: claude-schemas as Maven-analog (semver-tagged git artifact via peerDeps), palantir-mini plugin as OSDK-analog (single installable cross-project surface), home repo as control plane, authority chain (research→schemas→ontology→contracts→runtime→audits). Consumer pin matrix (all 3 projects at v0.2.1). Plugin upgrade protocol (no peerDep bump needed). Open alignment work noted.
sources.currencyRationale: Updated 2026-04-17 in orchestrate session. Directly governs v1.0 migration strategy and authority chain for this rebuild.

sources.summary: palantir-math/ontology/: 14 files (BROWSE.md, INDEX.md, BEHAVIOR.md, action.ts, capabilities/capabilities.ts, changeContracts/changeContracts.ts, data.ts, data/ subdir, frontend.ts, logic.ts, runtime.ts, schema.ts, security.ts). mathcrew/ontology/: 16 files (BROWSE.md, INDEX.md, action.ts, beat-template.ts, concept-primitive.ts, data.ts, event-envelope.ts, frontend-adapter.ts, frontend-semantic-core.ts, frontend.ts, learn.ts, logic.ts, runtime.ts, schema.ts, security.ts, theater-kind.ts). Home repo: no ontology/ dir.
sources.currencyRationale: Current filesystem state verified 2026-04-17. mathcrew has richer ontology (theater-kind.ts, event-envelope.ts, frontend-semantic-core.ts) vs palantir-math (capabilities, changeContracts). Home repo lacks ontology/ — gap to fill in v1.0.
